title: Data retention shrunk 90→30 days
summary: PII vendor unilaterally cut retention period; affects compliance

diff.before: Customer Personal Data shall be retained for a period of ninety (90) days following termination.
diff.after: Customer Personal Data shall be retained for a period of thirty (30) days following termination.

title: Sub-processor added in India
summary: New sub-processor in non-adequate jurisdiction requires customer notice

diff.before: Sub-processors are located in: United States, Germany, Ireland.
diff.after: Sub-processors are located in: United States, Germany, Ireland, India (Datadog India Pvt. Ltd.).

title: Renewal in 47 days — 412 unused of 850 seats
summary: $815k/yr · 412 unused seats represent $397k in recoverable waste

diff.after: Renewal window open. 412 seats idle >90 days. Benchmark: 12% above market rate.

title: New $0.30/intent fee added to pricing
summary: Stripe pricing page quietly added a per-PaymentIntent fee; estimated $12k annual impact

diff.after: 2.9% + 30¢ per successful card charge. Additionally, $0.30 per PaymentIntent created regardless of outcome.

title: 18 unused Figma Enterprise seats
summary: 18 seats with zero sessions in 60 days; $1.8k recoverable annually

diff.before: 68 active Figma Enterprise seats across design and product teams.
diff.after: 50 active / 18 seats with no login activity in 60+ days.

title: DPA updated: AI training clause added
summary: Slack DPA now permits using customer message data to train Slack AI models unless opted out

diff.before: Slack will not use Customer Data to train machine learning models.
diff.after: Slack may use aggregated, de-identified Customer Data to improve Slack AI features. Customers may opt out via Admin settings.

citations.quote: Slack may use aggregated, de-identified Customer Data to improve Slack AI features

title: Copilot Enterprise auto-add detected — 41 unintended seats
summary: GitHub auto-enrolled 41 seats in Copilot Enterprise; $5k annual overage not in budget

diff.before: GitHub Copilot Business: 87 seats (engineering org only).
diff.after: GitHub Copilot Enterprise: 128 seats (auto-enrolled all org members via policy change).

title: EC2 On-Demand price increase >10% in us-east-1
summary: m6i family prices increased 11.2%; estimated $42k annual impact on current usage

citations.quote: $0.2136 per On-Demand Linux m6i.xlarge Instance Hour

title: Sub-processor added in Germany (EU-adequate)
summary: Vercel added Hetzner GmbH (Germany) as a sub-processor; EU-adequate, low risk

diff.after: Infrastructure sub-processors: AWS (US), Google Cloud (US/EU), Hetzner GmbH (Germany, EU).

title: SOC 2 Type II cert expires in 60 days
summary: Okta SOC 2 cert expires 2026-07-23; renewal confirmation required for audit compliance

diff.before: Okta SOC 2 Type II (Period: 2025-07-24 to 2026-07-23) — Valid.
diff.after: Okta SOC 2 Type II — Expires in 60 days (2026-07-23). Renewal audit in progress.

citations.quote: SOC 2 Type II report valid through July 23, 2026

title: Renewal in 89 days — negotiate before Q3 freeze
summary: $96k/yr Marketing Hub Professional; 3 months to lock in pre-freeze pricing

diff.after: Renewal window open 89 days out. HubSpot increases prices in Q3; recommend negotiating now.

title: Adobe CC duplicates Figma — 24 seats redundant
summary: 24 Adobe CC seats overlap with Figma Enterprise assignments; $8.4k recoverable

diff.before: Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps: 24 seats in design team.
diff.after: 24 seats unused >90 days; team fully migrated to Figma. Duplicate tool overlap detected.
